title: Flavoured Survival
description: Vanilla with a handful of cosmetic and unobtrusive mods to enhance the vanilla feeling.
body:
## Want to play vanilla but with minimal changes to the experience? This is the pack for you!
![A household kitchen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e1477e48c0acb676fc91294f497e0363a4e7fc7_0.webp)
**Enjoy the comforting sun, shining through your well placed windows with shaders.**
![A game and storage room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea99e09b3a4650fbdd2c028b8fd5fad73de3d313_0.webp)
**Explore the expansive visuals with Distant Horizons.**
![A vast horizon landscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe0e6754af8aea11df3dd55e6c0d3cda6e2b4538_0.webp)
**Cook up a storm with Farmer's Delight and enjoy the comfort food it provides.**
![A lustrous farm with new crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b61969983c422467f9b57ae11591a0003ba90ead_0.webp)
**Match your weapons to your armour with weapon trims.**
![A unique array of equipment with new trims.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e746beccdf9accf4c46bc94f9be0158ca44a5ccf_0.webp)
